overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian waterfront market. The character moves from an open cooking area past palm trees along the Nile river, through produce stalls, and into a covered textile market with hanging fabrics and carpeted walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront path with outdoor cooking area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path past a smoking cooking fire and wooden market structures

entered.detail: rustic wooden stall with smoke rising from an outdoor cooking fire
white smoke billowing upward from the cooking area
group of palm trees with green and orange fronds
tall stone monument visible in the distance against the sky
distant mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dusty path in an ancient Egyptian settlement, passing a wooden cooking stall with rising smoke. Palm trees line the left side while a tall obelisk stands visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach along the Nile river

events.description: path transitions from dirt trail to sandy beach as character approaches the Nile river

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy waterfront with the Nile river visible to the right, approaching the water's edge

notable_agents.action: NPC standing in the shallow water near the shore
child NPC running along the beach path

entered.detail: calm river water with gentle ripples lapping at the shore
ancient stone structures and ruins visible across the river
figure swimming or wading in the river
beach area with light-colored sand along the water
small wooden boat visible on the water near the opposite bank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a sandy beach along the Nile river. The character walks past palm trees while ancient stone buildings stand visible across the water. A swimmer can be seen in the river and a child runs along the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air produce market with basket stalls

events.description: entering the market area with produce stalls and woven baskets displayed on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the produce market passing large baskets of vegetables and fruits displayed on stone pavement

notable_agents.action: male NPC in white tunic walking past the character from left to right

entered.detail: large wicker baskets filled with vegetables, fruits, and olives
red and orange fabric awnings providing shade over the market stalls
large terracotta jar sitting beside the produce baskets
colorful textiles hanging from wooden poles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling produce market with stone pavement underfoot. Wicker baskets filled with goods line the right side under red fabric canopies. A male NPC in white robes walks past as the character continues through the market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered textile market with stacked carpets and hanging fabrics

events.description: entering the covered textile market area with dense red fabric canopies overhead
lighting becomes darker and more diffused as character moves deeper under the dense fabric canopy

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market passage with tall stacks of textiles on the right and the river visible to the right

notable_agents.action: NPC standing by the water's edge looking out at the river

entered.detail: tall stacks of folded carpets and fabric rolls piled high
wooden racks with fish hanging to dry near the water
rough wooden poles and beams supporting the market structure
bundles of straw brooms tied together and leaning against stalls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered textile market with dense red fabric canopies overhead creating dappled shadows. Tall stacks of carpets line the right side while fish dry on racks near the river. The ground is covered with patterned rugs, and wooden scaffolding supports the market structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dusty settlement path that gradually transitions into a dense, covered waterfront market. It begins by passing a smoking wooden cooking stall and palm trees with a distant obelisk under a clear blue sky, before the path opens onto a sandy beach along the Nile where a swimmer and a running child are visible. As the character moves inland, the sandy terrain shifts to stone pavement, leading into a bustling produce market lined with wicker baskets and red fabric canopies. The scene finally closes in as the camera enters a covered textile market, where dappled shadows fall over patterned rugs and stacks of carpets beneath heavy red overhead fabrics.
